settings.title: 6,400+ home fermenters. One forum. No judgement.
settings.subtitle: Where people post photos of failed batches, ask questions, and share recipes. Free to join.

settings.heading: Where conversations happen.
settings.item_1_desc: Post a photo of your jar. Get diagnosis from mentors and other members. The most active category.
settings.item_2_desc: Member-developed recipes. Variations, regional adaptations, dietary mods. Top recipes graduate to /pages/recipes.
settings.item_3_desc: Strain talk, papers worth reading, gut-microbiome news. Heavily moderated to avoid pseudoscience.
settings.item_4_desc: First-batch questions, kit unboxings, what-do-I-do-now. No question too basic.
settings.item_5_desc: DIY airlocks, jar mods, weight alternatives, fermentation chambers. For people who tinker.
settings.item_6_desc: State-by-state traditional ferments. Black carrot kanji (Punjab), bori (Bengal), kombucha rituals, etc.

settings.heading: Three conversations going right now.
settings.item_1_title: Why is my kanji not turning red?
settings.item_1_desc: 47 replies · last 2 hours ago · started by Priya M. — diagnosing a black-carrot kanji that's clear instead of red. Mentor: Pooja.
settings.item_2_desc: 23 replies · last 6 hours ago · started by Karthik S. — recipe lab thread sharing North/South/East variations on no-oil achaar.
settings.item_3_desc: 12 replies · last yesterday · started by Dr Anita V. — discussing menaquinone production in lacto-fermented vegetables. Cite-heavy thread.

settings.heading: Five rules. That's it.
settings.body:
1. Be kind. Most fermenters are beginners; treat every question like it's the first time it's been asked (because for that person, it is).

2. No selling. Don't promote your own products, services, or other brands. Linking to a recipe or paper is fine.

3. Cite when claiming. Health claims need a source. "My grandmother said" is a source. "I read somewhere" is not.

4. No iodised salt arguments. We've had them. Use non-iodised. Move on.

5. Photos help. A picture of your jar tells us more in 1 second than 10 paragraphs.

settings.heading: Five members helping the most this month.

settings.title: Free to join. No spam, ever.
settings.desc: Sign in with email. We don't sell, share, or analyse your data. The forum is for fermenters, not advertisers.
